title: CrowdStrike Endpoint Security
description:
The CrowdStrike Endpoint Security connector is a standalone Python process that monitors events from OpenCTI and executes related actions to create, update or delete a data in CrowdStrike.
Summary
short_description: Streams OpenCTI threat intelligence to CrowdStrike Falcon, creating, updating, and deleting indicators in real time for endpoint detection and prevention.
